creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Section 15.2 states that "our 64-bit reference platform is sparc64".  While the reasoning is sound, sparc64 is Tier 2 now... is it still the 64-bit reference?

Text in question here:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/rules.html#idp67552432
